purpose: Highlights the Flat Bar and Plate in a different color.

Content: Flat Bar Profile is preferred in most of the connections where it is possible for fabrication.  . However, there might be a little variation, which can change the flat bar size to plate size. Identifying the plates manually is time consuming process. This application enables the user to identify by differentiating the flat bar and plate profile in a different color.

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Check Plate Profile under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process.
